name: Cash1
description_short: Community Choice Financial operates 700+ locations nationwide offering check cashing, deferred deposit loans, and prepaid card services through the Cash1 brand.
description_long:
Community Choice Financial (CCFI) was established in 1986 and has grown into a national financial services company operating over 700 neighborhood-based locations across the United States. The company serves underbanked and underserved consumers through multiple brands, with Cash1 being a primary consumer-facing portal for their services. The organization is licensed in multiple states including California, Ohio, Oregon, Idaho, and Texas, operating under strict regulatory oversight.

Cash1 primarily offers check cashing services, deferred deposit loans (payday loans), and prepaid card solutions. Customers can access services both in-store at physical locations and through an online portal at cash1.ccfi.com, where they can manage accounts, view transaction history, make payments, and access loan details. The company partners with Green Dot Bank to provide prepaid card features including direct deposit, overdraft protection, and ATM access. Services are available 24/7 through their online platform with phone support at (833) 241-3329.

Cash1 distinguishes itself through its established 37-year operating history, extensive physical location network, and integration with modern digital banking through Green Dot partnership. The company maintains state licensing compliance and emphasizes customer service as a core priority. Their omnichannel approach allows customers to handle transactions online or in-person, and they offer flexibility across multiple financial products rather than a single service type.

As a check-cashing and deferred deposit lender, Cash1 serves consumers who need immediate liquidity but may have limited traditional banking access. However, deferred deposit loans typically carry high APRs and fees, making them an expensive short-term borrowing option. The regulatory disclosures emphasize identity verification requirements and overdraft fees, indicating customers should carefully review terms before engaging services.
address: 1600 W El Camino Ave, Sacramento, CA 95833

company_info.headquarters: 1600 W El Camino Ave, Sacramento, CA 95833

pros: 700+ physical locations nationwide plus online access via cash1.ccfi.com for 24/7 account management
Licensed and regulated in multiple states (California, Ohio, Oregon, Idaho, Texas) with documented state licensing compliance
Online portal allows customers to upload documents, check transaction history, and view loan details anytime
Green Dot partnership provides FDIC-insured prepaid card option with direct deposit capability and overdraft protection
37-year operating history (founded 1986) demonstrates established market presence and longevity
Multi-service offerings including check cashing, deferred deposit loans, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment
Mobile verification and online account creation available for convenient account setup
cons: Deferred deposit loans (payday loans) carry high interest rates and fees typical of the industry, making them expensive short-term borrowing
Green Dot prepaid card charges ATM fees ($3 out-of-network, $1 balance inquiry) and limits free withdrawals to 1 per month
Mandatory identity verification and SSN collection required; overdraft fees ($15 per transaction) can accumulate quickly
Limited transparency on current APR rates and specific loan terms on the public website—must visit store or contact company
Check cashing services incur standard industry fees not detailed on provided website content
best_for: Consumers without traditional bank accounts needing immediate check cashing or deferred deposit loans
Individuals in areas with limited banking infrastructure who benefit from 700+ physical neighborhood locations
Customers seeking 24/7 online account access combined with in-store check cashing convenience
Unbanked or underbanked workers who need rapid access to paycheck funds and prepaid card features
diagnosis: Cash1 is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate access to check cashing or short-term deferred deposit loans and value physical location convenience combined with online account access. The primary caveat is that deferred deposit loans are expensive financing products with high APRs and fees; they should only be used for genuine emergencies and not as recurring borrowing solutions.
services: Deferred deposit loans (payday loans) in licensed states
Green Dot prepaid card issuance with direct deposit
Online account portal with transaction history and payment management
Document upload and loan detail viewing
ATM access through Green Dot network
Mobile and online account creation with identity verification
